title: AI Lead Rescue social card
description: Open-graph / Twitter / LinkedIn share card for the AI Lead Rescue surface (https://corpflowai.com/lead-rescue and aileadrescue.corpflowai.com). Premium architectural editorial photograph: a tidy desk corner with a leather portfolio, a small ceramic mug, and a brushed-brass document tray holding three paper folders against a deep navy wall.

licence.terms: Generated under the CorpFlowAI vetted prompt library (see CORPFLOW_PROMPT_LIBRARY.md, prompt_id: lead-rescue-social-card-architectural). Reviewed against BRAND_AND_CONVERSION_DOCTRINE.md. No third-party IP used. Free to use across CorpFlowAI marketing surfaces.

accessibility.alt: A calm modern desk corner: a polished dark-walnut surface with a closed leather portfolio, a small ceramic mug, and a brushed-brass document tray holding three paper folders against a deep navy wall in soft afternoon light.

usage.notes: slot:lead_rescue_social_card. Used as og:image and twitter:image for the AI Lead Rescue page. Source is 1200×800 (the generator's native ratio); social platforms typically letterbox to 1200×630 — image composition keeps the subject clear of the OG safe-area edges.

prompt_provenance.notes: Reviewed against BRAND_AND_CONVERSION_DOCTRINE.md — calm, restrained, premium, no AI tropes, no text/logos/people. Replaces the legacy 'lead-rescue-social-card' flat-illustration prompt for the production page.
